name: Snjór Ugla
title: the Snow Owl
lore:
Towering over the jagged peaks of the northern wasteland, Snjór Ugla is an ancient specter of ice. Her immense frame draped in the heavy, mottled plumage of a great snow owl. As the ageless Paragon of the Frost Giants, she rules her frozen domain with a stillness that is as suffocating as it is absolute.

To those who dwell in her shadow, she is a sovereign of terrifying consistency, known for a cold-blooded pragmatism that leaves no room for hesitation or mercy. Though her heart beats with the slow, rhythmic cadence of a glacier, her subjects follow her not out of love, but from a deep, ingrained reverence for the only ruler capable of keeping the biting winter at bay.

abilities.name: Permafrost
abilities.details: Snjór's abilities apply Permafrost stacks to enemies for a few seconds, reducing their [db]movement speed[/] per stack (max 5 stacks).[n]At maximum stacks, the target will be frozen solid, consuming the stacks and [db]stunning[/] them for a short duration.[n]If Snjór hits a frozen enemy with an ability, she shatters the ice, dealing bonus [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/] plus the target's [db]missing health[/]).

abilities.name: Glacial Spikes
abilities.details: Snjór flings a barrage of 3 icicles in a target direction over 1.5 seconds that each shatter upon the first enemy hit, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/]) to nearby enemies.[n]Subsequent hits deal less damage.

abilities.name: Ice Wall
abilities.details: Snjór manifests a crystalline wall of ice at a target location that acts as a solid terrain and [db]obstructs[/] enemy movement.[n]The wall last for a few seconds, and nearby enemies are chilled, instantly gaining a stack of Permafrost.[n]When cast on top of a Frozen Domain, the wall's length [bf]increases[/]. The wall will manifest first in original size, then the rest of the extra length will manifest shortly after.[n]Casting Frozen Domain at an existing Ice Wall will also have the same effect.

abilities.name: Frozen Domain
abilities.details: Snjór marks a target area in freezing mist.[n]The area rapidly chills all enemies inside, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/]) and applying 1 stack of Permafrost every half of seconds.

abilities.name: Eternal Solstice
abilities.details: Snjór summons a giant glacial shard at a target location, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/]) to all enemies hit.[n]If the shard lands on a Frozen Domain, the domain's range will increase, dealing the same damage to all enemies it reaches.[n]The same enemies cannot be hit twice by both the initial shard fall and the domain's extension.
